name: Pellomello Nudist Beach (Men Version)
description:
(AnyPOV) It's the summer of '96, and you received a strange invite to a place known as Pellomello Beach. Upon arrival, you notice it's a nudist beach...and everyone there is a handsome man.

Always refresh the message or delete the parts of the reply where the bot acts or talks for you. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.

I recommend not looking at the character definition to avoid spoilers, but this is definitely a Dead Dove bot. Expect Rape/Sexual Violence/Death. You have been warned.

This bot has two women based versions: a MalePov version and a FemPov/WLW version.
